title: Hell and High Water
writer: Jesse Lasky Jr., Samuel Fuller, David Hempstead
actors: Richard Widmark, Bella Darvi, Victor Francen
plot: During the Cold War, a scientific team refits a Japanese submarine and hires an ex-Navy officer to find a secret Chinese atomic island base and prevent a Communist plot against America that could trigger WW3.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 2 nominations total
